name: Interrupt — calm the caller
instructions: The caller is upset, panicking, crying, swearing in distress, or says they're overwhelmed. Acknowledge briefly and check safety — one or two sentences, no upsell, no rushing. If they want a person, transfer. Otherwise return to whatever flow was interrupted when they're ready.

entry_condition.expression: Caller is audibly upset, panicking, crying, swearing in distress, or says they're shaken or overwhelmed.

condition.expression: Caller has indicated they're ready to continue.
Caller wants to speak with a person.
